title: SR 12-4: Supervisory Letter SR 12-4 on         Upgrades of Supervisory Ratings for Banking Organizations with $10 Billion or Less in Total Consolidated Assets  -- March 1, 2012
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 12-4 on         Upgrades of Supervisory Ratings for Banking Organizations with $10 Billion or Less in Total Consolidated Assets  -- March 1, 2012
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-4
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations: This guidance applies to all institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less, including state member banks and bank holding companies.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION
